script_text: You already know some sight words. It is time for more!
Second grade sight words show up in every book.
Because is a big word that shows up a lot.
People has a silent O. P-e-o-p-l-e!
Again has an AI but sounds like uh-gen.
Could has a silent L! C-o-u-l-d, sounds like kood.
The more often you see a sight word, the faster you know it.
Now you are ready for more sight words!
